title: Backup & Restore
loadError: Failed to load backups. Please try again later.

empty.description: Create your first backup to secure your data

createDialog.title: Create Backup
createDialog.description: Create a manual backup of your database. This may take a few moments.

uploadDialog.title: Upload and Restore Backup
uploadDialog.description: Upload a backup file (.ofbak) to restore your database
uploadDialog.warning: This will overwrite all current data. A safety backup will be created automatically.

restoreDialog.title: Restore Backup?
restoreDialog.description: This will overwrite all current data with the backup from {{date}}. A safety backup will be created automatically. This action cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Backup?
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{filename}}"? This action cannot be undone.

alerts.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please select a .ofbak file.
alerts.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 100 MB.
alerts.restoreSuccess:
Success: {{message}}

Please restart the application for changes to take effect.
alerts.restoreFailed: Failed to restore backup. Please check the console for details.

overview.cardDescription: Create and manage backups of your financial data. Backups are compressed and include integrity verification for secure restoration.
overview.tipText: Automatic backups are created weekly by default. You can manually create backups at any time and restore from previous versions.
overview.aboutGzip: Backups are compressed (GZIP) to save disk space
overview.aboutChecksum: Each backup includes SHA-256 checksum for integrity verification
overview.aboutSafety: A safety backup is automatically created before restoring
overview.aboutRetention: Automatic backups are retained for the last 7 versions by default
overview.aboutDownload: You can download backups to store them externally
